appStoreMetadata.releaseNotes: Welcome to Newport Hustle! Experience the heart of Arkansas in this mobile adventure game.

description.short: Experience the heart of Arkansas in Newport Hustle - a mobile adventure celebrating small-town values and community spirit.
description.long:
Welcome to Newport Hustle, an immersive mobile adventure set in the beautiful town of Newport, Arkansas. Explore authentic locations along the White River, build relationships with memorable characters, and discover what it means to be part of a tight-knit community.

Key Features:
• Authentic Newport, AR setting with real street names and locations
• Engaging storyline celebrating small-town values and community spirit
• Character creation system with meaningful choices
• Mobile-optimized controls designed for touch gameplay
• Beautiful graphics showcasing Arkansas's natural beauty
• Rich dialogue system with memorable local characters
• Mission-based gameplay with both main story and side quests
• Respectful representation of real community members (with permission)

From the historic downtown area to the scenic riverfront, Newport Hustle captures the authentic spirit of Arkansas life. Whether you're helping local business owners, exploring the White River, or uncovering the stories that make Newport special, every interaction matters in this heartfelt adventure.

Perfect for players who enjoy:
• Story-driven adventure games
• Community-focused gameplay
• Authentic cultural representation
• Mobile-friendly adventure experiences
• Games that celebrate real places and people

Join the Newport community and discover your own hustle in the Natural State!

contentRating.description: Suitable for all ages. Positive themes, community values, no violence or inappropriate content.

descriptions: Explore authentic Newport, Arkansas locations including downtown Main Street
Meet memorable characters and build lasting relationships in the community
Beautiful mobile interface designed specifically for touch gameplay
Create your character and discover your place in Newport's story
Experience the scenic beauty of the White River and surrounding areas

taglines: Where Small Town Dreams Come Alive
highlights: Authentic Arkansas setting with real locations

android.gpu: Adreno 530, Mali-G71 MP8, PowerVR GX6450 or equivalent
Adreno 640, Mali-G76 MP16, PowerVR GM9446 or better
